findings.description: Step e) is entirely omitted. The source describes how to verify the Action class was reached via console log patterns: look for `@@@@ DISPATCHING CLASS @@@@` followed by `**** BEFORE ACTION ****`, and a `JSP NOT FOUND` error as the expected outcome at this stage. These verification patterns help developers confirm correct implementation during TDD.
findings.source_evidence: source e): 「ログ中の「@@@@ DISPATCHING CLASS @@@@」の次に「BEFORE ACTION」が出力されていれば、Actionまで処理が到達している」および JSP NOT FOUND エラーのログ例
